message:
test(scanner,notify,swarm): add pure-logic unit tests

- scanner: SeverityMeetsThreshold (9 severity pair combinations),
  truncateMessage (9 edge cases including UTF-8), shortenPath (6 cases)
- notify: jsonEscape (7 cases including unicode, HTML escaping, control chars)
- swarm: isCodexProvider (10 agent type classifications)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
